movies.title: Avatar
movies.description: A paraplegic Marine dispatched to the moon Pandora on a unique mission becomes torn between following his orders and protecting the world he feels is his home.

movies.title: Avatar: The Way of Water
movies.description: Jake Sully lives with his newfound family on Pandora. A familiar threat returns.

movies.title: Star Wars: The Force Awakens
movies.description: A new threat arises as the First Order attempts to rule the galaxy.

movies.title: Avengers: Infinity War
movies.description: The Avengers must stop Thanos from collecting all the Infinity Stones.

movies.title: Jurassic World
movies.description: A new theme park is built on the original site of Jurassic Park.

movies.title: The Lion King (2019)
movies.description: Simba idolizes his father, King Mufasa, and takes to heart his own royal destiny.

movies.title: Furious 7
movies.description: Deckard Shaw seeks revenge against Dominic Toretto and his family.

movies.title: The Avengers
movies.description: Earth's mightiest heroes must come together to stop Loki.

movies.title: Frozen II
movies.description: Elsa, Anna, Kristoff, Olaf and Sven leave Arendelle to travel to an ancient forest.

movies.title: Avengers: Age of Ultron
movies.description: The Avengers must stop the rogue A.I. Ultron from enacting global extinction.

movies.title: Black Panther
movies.description: T'Challa returns home to Wakanda to serve as king.

movies.title: Avengers: Endgame
movies.description: After the devastating events of Avengers: Infinity War, the universe is in ruins. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers assemble once more.

movies.title: Titanic
movies.description: A seventeen-year-old aristocrat falls in love with a kind but poor artist aboard the luxurious, ill-fated R.M.S. Titanic.
